label: plan
title: Introduction to DevOps

label: commit
title: Linux, shell scripting & Git

Automate routine tasks with Bash scripting
Master Git & GitHub: branching, pull requests and open-source contribution

label: design
title: Networking & system design
bullets: Understand OSI / TCP-IP, DNS and how traffic actually flows
Work with load balancers and core network security
Reason about how systems are designed to scale

label: build
title: Docker & containerization
bullets: Containerize real applications with clean, multi-stage Dockerfiles
Manage images, volumes and networks; debug running containers
Run multi-service apps locally with Docker Compose

label: integrate
title: CI/CD & DevSecOps
bullets: Build pipelines that test, build and ship on every commit
Work across Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD and GitHub Actions
Bake security into the pipeline with a DevSecOps mindset

label: cloud
title: AWS cloud (Solutions Architect)
bullets: Navigate the core AWS services architects use daily
Design with compute, networking, storage and databases
Go serverless with modern AWS frameworks

label: provision
title: Infrastructure as Code
bullets: Provision cloud infrastructure declaratively with Terraform
Configure and manage servers with Ansible
Structure reusable modules and manage remote state

label: orchestrate
title: Kubernetes & GitOps
bullets: Deploy, scale and operate applications on Kubernetes
Package and release with Helm

label: observe
title: Monitoring & observability
bullets: Instrument systems with metrics, logs and traces
Build dashboards and alerts with Prometheus and Grafana
Trace requests end-to-end with OpenTelemetry

label: operate
title: Agentic AI for DevOps
bullets: Build AI agents that automate real DevOps workflows
Work hands-on with modern agentic AI frameworks
Put AI to work on troubleshooting, operations and automation

label: production

bullets: Build and present a production-grade capstone project, end to end
